posts.author: Fabrice (DELANNOY)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello community
I would like the feature that appeared and then disappeared to come back — the PDF export functionality for Portfolio views.
It would also be helpful if this feature allowed scheduling PDF exports.
I want to use it to keep a record of project reporting, so I can track decisions made and follow up on the project over several weeks.
Thank You,
Regards,
Fabrice.
